message:
fix(manifest): auto-fix generated artifact checksum drift

Detected by check-manifest-drift.sh.
Regenerated installer and web generated artifacts via `bun run generate`
to sync ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256 and internal checksums with source files.

files.patch:
@@ -8,18 +8,18 @@
 # Used by check-manifest-drift.sh to detect unauthorized changes.
 
 declare -gA ACFS_INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS=(
-  [scripts/lib/security.sh]="6416f379937783191ad08a382ef413490f5e444202324fc19981481c1877dd60"
+  [scripts/lib/security.sh]="11d4e3089432cc59931289f1b6693b29ffdd8327adf60ac9cd834d25c9341894"
   [scripts/lib/agents.sh]="c4c97f04c50cc8d3026f30748f75bce1b2687ebe3ea8618d35ec60b37ec706c9"

+  [scripts/lib/update.sh]="349dc91cf15e7f7652bb9a03f4a6809c4ec3aa0febdad9b609201cd259cdc145"
   [scripts/lib/doctor.sh]="b1c7ae85d82aea3ab510eff0ded546576793dd7e372f671fd08ced546d0f2138"
